name: Verastem, Inc.
summary: Verastem, Inc. is a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing medicines for cancer. Its marketed product is AVMAPKI FAKZYNJA CO-PACK (avutometinib capsules; defactinib tablets). Its pipeline includes avutometinib (RAF/MEK inhibitor), defactinib (FAK inhibitor), and VS-7375 (a selective oral KRAS G12D dual ON/OFF inhibitor). The company conducts clinical trials including RAMP 201, RAMP 201J, RAMP 205, RAMP 301, and VS-7375 trials.

products.name: AVMAPKI FAKZYNJA CO-PACK (avutometinib + defactinib)
products.description: Commercially approved co-pack combining avutometinib capsules (RAF/MEK inhibitor) and defactinib tablets (FAK inhibitor) for cancer treatment.

products.name: avutometinib
products.description: RAF/MEK inhibitor in clinical development for cancer, used in combination with defactinib and other compounds.

products.name: defactinib
products.description: Focal adhesion kinase (FAK) inhibitor licensed from Pfizer, used in combination therapies for cancer.

products.name: VS-7375
products.description: Selective oral KRAS G12D dual ON/OFF inhibitor in clinical development for cancer.

partnerships.description: License agreement covering certain Pfizer FAK inhibitors, including defactinib.
Asset purchase agreement with Secura, including provisions related to milestone payments.
Collaboration and option agreement for drug candidate development.
